item.title: AIPAC Wants Democrats to Back Israel. Instead, They’re Turning on AIPAC.
item.description: Once the guardian of the bipartisan pro-Israel consensus, it is now a polarizing force in the party.

item.title: ‘Almost There, Almost There, Almost There’: The Hopes and the Heartbreak of the '90s Knicks
item.description: 28 years ago, the team’s nemesis Reggie Miller sunk a shot that dashed their playoff dreams. Here’s what Spike Lee and others sitting courtside remember.

item.title: My Tween Daughter’s Friend Is a Mean Girl. Should I Tell Her Mother?
item.description: Many of the girl’s friends have begun distancing themselves from her, and I don’t know if her mother understands the full extent of the problem.

item.title: Is This the End of Political Islam?
item.description: For decades, Islamic governance held allure in the Middle East. Now some scholars say the Islamist wave has passed.

item.title: Can I Break My Husband’s Restaurant Boycott?
item.description: A dispute over how to handle a cracked soup container.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Feud With Delaware May Transform Corporate America
item.description: An angry Musk has taken his business elsewhere, and has urged other companies to follow suit.

item.title: Can a Dinner Host Set a Drink Limit?
item.description: A ruling on an alcohol-related dispute.

item.title: Our Allies Are Wondering Whether Supporting the American War Machine Is Worth It
item.description: Is the Iran war an early sign of “superpower suicide"?

item.title: Danny McBride Thinks Men Learned All the Wrong Lessons From Movies
item.description: The writer and actor, known for his profane comedic antiheroes, likes to find universal truths in human flaws.

item.title: I’m Worried My Friends’ Son May Harm Them. What Should I Do?
Six Takeaways From the Times Investigation Into Epstein’s Death
item.description: We considered every plausible theory of his death, both official and otherwise, seeking out the most persuasive arguments and evidence for each.

item.title: The Untold Story of Jeffrey Epstein’s Death
item.description: New evidence, new interviews and the fullest investigation yet into the question of whether he killed himself.

item.title: Seth Rogen Knows the Secret to Marriage — and Being Rich in Hollywood
item.description: After three decades in the industry, the actor-writer-director-producer has figured a lot out.

item.title: What I Learned About Masculinity at Thai Kickboxing School
item.description: A week inside a grueling Muay Thai training program in Phuket.
